title: APSC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 53 Junior Engineer Posts
description: The Assam Public Service Commission (APSC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 53 Junior Engineer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma in Electrical Engineering can apply for the APSC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process...
